meta.title: Lan Read — Your first AI-powered reading companion
meta.description: Lan Read turns ePub/txt into a conversational mentor on iOS and iPadOS: instant summaries, skimming, ask-while-reading, Notion export, privacy-first local storage.

hero.title: Read faster, understand deeper
hero.subtitle: Lan Read uses AI to map the whole book first, then guide you into the chapters that matter, so understanding, notes, and retention happen naturally.

vision: Turn reading from input into real understanding

facts.label: Storage
facts.value: Saved locally by default, no signup required

facts.label: Export
facts.value: Notion export for highlights and bookmarks

facts.label: Share Notes
facts.value: Turn highlights and annotations into shareable note cards

features.title: Core Capabilities

items.title: Local Book Import
items.body: Import ePub / txt from your device and build a private library.

items.title: Instant AI Guide
items.body: Open any book to get instant full-book and chapter-level guidance.

items.title: Skimming Mode
items.body: Use chapter skeletons to build context fast and choose where to dive deep.

items.title: Understand While Reading
items.body: Explain, translate, and extend understanding anytime while you read.

items.title: Complete Reading Toolkit
items.body: TOC, search, bookmarks, highlights, annotations, and typography controls for everyday reading.

items.title: Export & Retention
items.body: Export bookmarks and highlights to Notion to continue your organizing and writing flow.

items.title: Share Knowledge Cards
items.body: Quickly turn highlights and insights from reading into shareable cards.

features.privacyNote: No signup required. Start reading first. Your data stays local by default.

steps.title: Import
steps.body: Import ePub / txt and build your own library.

steps.title: Overview
steps.body: Start with a full-book and chapter overview to build context quickly.

steps.title: Read
steps.body: Highlight, ask, and deepen understanding as you read.

steps.title: Retain
steps.body: Export highlights and notes to Notion to build long-term retention.

steps.title: Share
steps.body: Turn discussion-worthy passages into cards and share with others.

privacy.title: Privacy
lines: Your library, annotations, and reading history stay on your device by default.
Network requests happen only when you actively use AI features or export content.
We minimize unnecessary data exposure so reading stays private.

footer.note: © 2026 Lan Read — Designed for people who read seriously.
